title: Technology Architect
description:
Job Summary
A global leader in technology consulting and digital transformation, the client delivers innovative solutions that enhance business performance and resilience. With deep expertise in cloud computing, data analytics, and AI-driven insights, they help organizations modernize systems, improve scalability, and accelerate operational efficiency. Their end-to-end approach to enterprise transformation empowers companies across industries to innovate with confidence and stay competitive in a rapidly evolving digital landscape. Our client is looking for a Technology Architect responsible for implementing testing related matters.

Main Responsibilities

  • Define and implement performance testing strategies, plans, and scripts.
  • Collaborate with architects, developers, and business stakeholders to identify performance requirements and KPIs.
  • Lead performance test execution, analyze results, and identify bottlenecks.
  • Provide detailed performance reports and recommendations to technical and business teams.
  • Manage performance testing tools, environments, and data.
  • Mentor junior testers and coordinate with global QA teams.

Qualification and Profile

  • Proven experience in performance testing and engineering
  • Hands-on expertise with tools such as LoadRunner, JMeter, NeoLoad, or Gatling.
  • Strong scripting skills (e.g., Java, Python, JavaScript).
  • Deep understanding of system architecture, performance tuning, and monitoring.
  • Excellent analytical, communication, and stakeholder management skills.


Next Step

  • If interested, you can click on “Apply here” or write an e-mail to dimple.jain@adecco.com with your updated resume.
  • NOTE: - Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted back.

Dimple Jain
EA LIcence No. 91C2918
Personnel Registration No. R22107270

postedCompany.description:
The Adecco Group is the world's leading provider of HR solutions. With over 35,000 FTE employees and over 5,200 branches, in over 60 countries and territories around the world, we offer a wide variety of services, connecting more than 650,000 associates with over 100,000 clients every day.

The services we offer fall into the broad categories of temporary staffing, permanent placement, career transition and talent development, as well as outsourcing and consulting. The Adecco Group is based in Zurich-Glattbrugg, Switzerland and we are a Fortune Global 500 company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
postedCompany.name: ADECCO PERSONNEL PTE LTD
